chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 114 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.391/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 20.06.2025 None present, nor has any intimation been received despite issuance of notice to Counsel for the petitioners. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Continuous absence of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that they have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with the listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
